---
output: 
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
params:
  site: "DUCK"
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '')
```

```{r imports, echo = FALSE, results = 'hide', include = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

filepath <- "D:/NETN/Monitoring_Projects/Freshwater_Wetland/EPA_NWCA/2016_Data/2021_release/ACAD_only"
filenames <- list.files(filepath)
list.files(filepath)
site_df <- data.frame(Local_Name = c("DUCK", "WMTN", "BIGH", "GILM", "LIHU", "NEMI", "GRME", "HEBR", "HODG", "FRAZ"),
                      Full_Name = c("Duck Pond Peatland", "Western Mountain Swamp", "Big Heath", "Gilmore Meadow",
                                    "Little Hunter Brook", "New Mills Meadow - NW", "Great Meadow (IAH)", "Heath Brook",
                                    "Hodgdon Swamp", "Frazer Fen"),
                      NWCA_codes = c("NWCA16-R301", "NWCA16-R302", "NWCA16-R303", "NWCA16-R304", "NWCA16-R305",
                                     "NWCA16-R306", "NWCA16-R307", "NWCA16-R308", "NWCA16-R309", "NWCA16-R310"))

# Import NWCA data and drop columns with all NA
import_csv <- function(filename){
  df <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "/", filename))
  df <- df[,colSums(is.na(df)) < nrow(df)]
  return(df)
}

prep_data <- function(df, site){
  df <- df %>% filter(Local_Name == site)
  df <- df[,colSums(is.na(df)) < nrow(df)]
  df_long <- t(df)[-c(1:2),]
  return(df_long)
}

# Site characterization data
AAchar <- import_csv(filenames[1])[, c("SITE_ID", "Local_Name" ,"VALXSITE", "AA_AREA", "AA_CENTER",
                                       "AA_LAT", "AA_LON", "AA_LAYOUT", "AA_POINT",
                                       "HGM_CLASS", "DEPRESSION", "FLATS", "RIVERINE", "SLOPE")]


AAhydro_source <- import_csv(filenames[2])[, c("SITE_ID", "Local_Name", "OUTFLOWS", "INFLOW_PRESENT", "PRECIP_PRESENT",
                                               "GRDWATER_PRESENT", "INFLOW_RANK", "PRECIP_RANK", "GRDWATER_RANK")]

AAhydro_ind <- import_csv(filenames[4]) %>% select(-UID, -(PUBLICATION_DATE:DATE_COL))

waterchar <- import_csv(filenames[19])

```

```{r kable_tables, echo = F, include = F, results = 'hide'}
AAchar_kbl <- kable(prep_data(AAchar, params$site), 
                    col.names = c("AA Characterization"), format = "html", align = 'c') %>% 
              kable_styling(fixed_thead = TRUE, bootstrap_options = c('condensed'), 
                            full_width = FALSE, position = 'left', font_size = 12) %>% 
              column_spec(1, extra_css = "border-left: 1px solid #000000;") %>% 
              column_spec(2, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
              column_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #CACACA;') %>% 
              row_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
              row_spec(length(prep_data(AAchar, params$site)), extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
              row_spec(1:(length(prep_data(AAchar, params$site))-1), extra_css = "border-bottom: 0.5px solid #CACACA;")

AAhydrosrc_kbl <- kable(prep_data(AAhydro_source, params$site),
                        col.names = c("AA Hydro Sources"), format = "html", align = 'c') %>% 
                  kable_styling(fixed_thead = TRUE, bootstrap_options = 'condensed',
                                full_width = FALSE, position = 'left', font_size = 12) %>% 
                column_spec(1, extra_css = "border-left: 1px solid #000000;") %>% 
                column_spec(2, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                column_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #CACACA;') %>% 
                row_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                row_spec(length(prep_data(AAhydro_source, params$site)), 
                         extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                row_spec(1:(length(prep_data(AAhydro_source, params$site))-1), 
                         extra_css = "border-bottom: 0.5px solid #CACACA;")

AAhydroind_kbl <- kable(prep_data(AAhydro_ind, params$site),
                        col.names = c("AA Hydro Indicators"), format = "html", align = 'c') %>% 
                  kable_styling(fixed_thead = TRUE, bootstrap_options = 'condensed',
                                full_width = FALSE, position = 'left', font_size = 12) %>% 
                column_spec(1, extra_css = "border-left: 1px solid #000000;") %>% 
                column_spec(2, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                column_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-right: 1px solid #CACACA;') %>% 
                row_spec(1, extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                row_spec(length(prep_data(AAhydro_ind, params$site)), 
                         extra_css = 'border-bottom: 1px solid #000000;') %>% 
                row_spec(1:(length(prep_data(AAhydro_ind, params$site))-1), 
                         extra_css = "border-bottom: 0.5px solid #CACACA;")

```

### EPA NWCA 2016 Data Summary for: 
#### `r paste(site_df$NWCA_codes[site_df$Local_Name == params$site], site_df$Full_Name[site_df$Local_Name == params$site], sep = ": ")`

<div class = "column-left">
```{r AAchar, echo = F}
AAchar_kbl
```
</div>
<div class = "column-center">
```{r AAhydsrc, echo = F}
AAhydrosrc_kbl
```
</div>
<div class = "column-right">
```{r AAhydind, echo = F} 
AAhydroind_kbl
```
</div>
